summary: Reviewed OpenClaw v1 mission-control correctness with focus on preflight gating and status synchronization. Found two P1 issues: one causes sync crashes on malformed reviewer JSON; one allows invalid status strings to be treated as completed and can incorrectly pass gates.
commands_run: repro: malformed reviewer JSON causes update_task_status.py --sync traceback
repro: status='completed | blocked | failed' is coerced to completed and passes gate

validation.notes: update_task_status.py exits 1 with JSONDecodeError from collect_findings(), no status.json written

validation.command: python repro for invalid status token
validation.notes: status 'completed | blocked | failed' is treated as completed and review gate passes without preflight issue

findings.title: Malformed reviewer JSON crashes status sync
evidence: adapters/openclaw/scripts/update_task_status.py:308 reads reviewer JSON via read_json() without JSONDecodeError handling inside collect_findings()
adapters/openclaw/scripts/update_task_status.py:919 only catches FileNotFoundError in --sync path, so decode errors crash the process
Repro: malformed T003 reviewer JSON returns code 1 with traceback and status.json is not generated
findings.impact: A single malformed reviewer report can halt mission-control synchronization and block all gate progression.
findings.recommendation: Handle JSONDecodeError in collect_findings() (skip file with warning metadata) and keep sync_status resilient.

findings.title: Invalid status strings are coerced to completed, enabling false gate pass
evidence: adapters/openclaw/scripts/update_task_status.py:131-133 converts any non-empty invalid status string to 'completed'
Repro: JSON status value 'completed | blocked | failed' yields task_status=completed, gate=passed, preflight_issues=[]
findings.impact: Template leftovers or malformed status values can be accepted as completion, causing false-positive gate transitions.
findings.recommendation: Treat invalid status tokens as blocked/failed validation (or pending), not completed; require exact enum match.

risks: Self-check suite currently does not include malformed reviewer JSON in results_dir or invalid status-token coercion cases.
handoff_notes: Requested review skill 'ssrd' is not available in this runtime's installed skills list; completed manual code review plus reproductions instead.
